open_positions.name: Extreme Networks
open_positions.thesis: Sympathy selling off CALX print - both are networking/access equipment names. EXTR down 5.8% on 3x volume with no company-specific news in feed, while XLK is up 2.2%, strongly suggests read-through trade. Catalyst: CALX -14% print dragging networking peers. Falsified by: Discovery of EXTR-specific negative catalyst (pre-announce, lost deal, downgrade) would validate the move; continued sector-wide weakness would suggest broader enterprise IT spend concern.
open_positions.latest_reasoning: Entered 4 days ago on sympathy-selling thesis: EXTR down 5.8% on 3x volume with no company-specific catalyst, while XLK sector up 2.2%. CALX print (-14%) was the proposed driver. No EXTR-specific news has emerged to validate the move or break the thesis. Unrealized loss of -6.76% is within expected noise for a days-horizon mean-reversion setup. Sector backdrop (XLK positive) has not turned hostile. Position size (1.6% of equity) is well within guardrails. Will monitor for falsifiers: (1) EXTR-specific negative catalyst (pre-announce, deal loss, downgrade), or (2) sustained enterprise IT weakness across the sector. Neither has materialized. Reversal catalyst (analyst upgrade, enterprise spending commentary, CALX stabilization) could trigger exit on target or thesis shift.

trade_log.why: Opened per flag: LIKELY OVERDONE conf 3 — CALX -14% print dragging networking peers
